item.title: US shelves major tech curbs on China after Trump-Xi trade detente
item.description: That meeting also included a pledge by the Chinese to delay painful export restrictions on the rare-earth minerals that underpin tech manufacturing gl...

item.title: Odisha OTET result 2026 out: 68.97% pass rate, check how to download scores
item.description: The Odisha Board of Secondary Education has released the Odisha Teacher Eligibility Test 2026 results today, on the official website at bseodisha.ac.i...

item.title: Rajasthan govt actively pushes natural farming; 250K farmers on board
item.description: The state government's goal is to nudge farmers towards chemical-free practices that also increase incomes

item.title: Shell to expand integrated gas, GCC footprint in India: Mansi Tripathy
item.description: The $289 billion energy major plans to sign more LNG deals and expand global capability centres, while strengthening its lubricants business in India

item.title: Uttar Pradesh govt's pharma investment kitty hits ₹38,000 crore
item.description: India's pharma market is estimated to touch $120 billion by 2030 while Uttar Pradesh accounts for roughly 17 percent of domestic sales
